title: RTX ON TITAN
description: RTX ON but with a combination of Attack on Titan
body: This combination of RTX ON and Attack on Titan really brings the story of Attack on Titan to life like never before, featuring a vast majority of iconic Titans from the Cart Titan to the formidable Attack Titan. It also adds in famous gear used in the actual anime such as ODM gear and dual-wielding swords and Thunder Spears to really impact the Titans you walk into along your Minecraft journey. Every detail is rendered with incredible blocky realism, allowing you to witness the colossal battles and vast landscapes in high quality. For the ultimate immersion, step into the experience in VR and truly feel the scale and terror of the Titans. So it's best you be ready to fight many Titans, because they will cause you huge problems, especially if you just loaded a new world. The choice is yours: defend humanity as a skilled member of the military or unleash your power as a Titan Shifter.
